location.p:
Leeds has grown into one of the UK's most active regional centres for senior hiring, driven by the strength of its financial and professional services sector, a rapidly expanding technology ecosystem, and the presence of major national businesses across retail, healthcare, and public services. The city's combination of strong connectivity, competitive talent costs relative to London, and a growing reputation as a place where ambitious executives choose to build careers makes it an increasingly attractive location for both organisations and senior hires.

The Leeds executive talent market is characterised by strong networks and relatively high visibility — the senior professional community is compact enough that most experienced executives know each other, which creates both opportunity (warm introductions are common) and complexity (the confidentiality of a search can be harder to maintain). Search firms operating in Leeds need genuine local credibility and relationships, not just awareness of the market.
location.roles: CEO, CFO, Technology Director, Commercial Director, Head of Compliance, Operations Director, HR Director, Head of Digital, Finance Director, Head of Risk
